zh.lifeSummary: 當John Allen Griffith於大約1800年出生在美國南卡羅來納州時，他的父親Joshua Griffith27歲，母親Mary Polly Chapman29歲。他和Nancy Young至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他於1870年住在美國阿肯色州蘭多夫洛亞諾可 堂史普且於1880年住在美國阿肯色州蘭多夫真斯 可可 堂史普。他去世於1880年6月2日之後在美國阿拉巴馬州克萊，埋葬在美國阿肯色州勞倫斯拉文登 斯普林斯真斯 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Allen Griffith于大约1800年出生在美国南卡罗来纳州时，他的父亲Joshua Griffith27岁，母亲Mary Polly Chapman29岁。他和Nancy Young至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他于1870年住在美国阿肯色州蘭多夫洛亞諾可 堂史普且于1880年住在美国阿肯色州蘭多夫真斯 可可 堂史普。他去世于1880年6月2日之后在美国亚拉巴马州克萊，埋葬在美国阿肯色州勞倫斯拉文登 斯普林斯真斯 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Allen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
Historical Boundaries - 1815: Lawrence, Missouri Territory, United States; 1819: Lawrence, Arkansas Territory, United States; 1836: Lawrence, Arkansas, United States

historicEvents.title: Financial Relief for Public Land
historicEvents.description: A United States law to provide financial relief for the purchasers of Public Lands. It permitted the earlier buyers, that couldn't pay completely for the land, to return the land back to the government. This granted them a credit towards the debt they had on land. Congress, also, extended credit to buyer for eight more years. Still while being in economic panic and the shortage of currency made by citizens, the government hoped that with the time extension, the economy would improve.

historicEvents.title: Slave Rebellion
historicEvents.description: "On June 16, 1822,  Denmark Vesey a free and self-educated African American leads a slave rebellion called ""the rising."" The interesting thing about this rebellion is that it does not really happen. The only thing the judges have to go on is the testimony of people that witness it."
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries: 1850: Gordon, Georgia, United States
South Carolina is where the first shots of the Civil War were fired.
Arkansas supplied an estimated 50,000 men to the Confederate Army andabout 15,000 to the Union Army.

en.lifeSummary: When John Allen Griffith was born about 1800, in South Carolina, United States, his father, Joshua Griffith, was 27 and his mother, Mary Polly Chapman, was 29. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Nancy Young. He lived in Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arkansas, United States in 1870 and Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arkansas, United States in 1880. He died after 2 June 1880, in Clay, Alabama, United States, and was buried in Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arkansas, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Allen Griffith est né environ 1800, à Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, son père, Joshua Griffith, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Polly Chapman, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Nancy Young. Il a vécu à Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1870 et à Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1880. Il est décédé après 2 juin 1880, à Clay, Alabama, États-Unis, et a été enterré à Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arkansas, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Allen Griffith è nato il circa 1800 nel Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Joshua Griffith, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary Polly Chapman, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Nancy Young. Vissuto a Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1870 e nel Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1880. Morì dopo il 2 giugno 1880, nel Clay, Alabama, Stati Uniti d'America, e fu sepolto a Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arkansas, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Allen Griffithが約1800年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州で生まれた時，父Joshua Griffithは27歳，母Mary Polly Chapmanは29歳であった。彼はNancy Youngとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1870年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ランドルフロアノク トウンシュイップに，1880年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ランドルフジャンス クレエク トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1880年6月2日以後にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州クレイで死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ラウレンスラベンデン スプリングズジャンス セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Allen Griffith(이)가 대략 1800년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joshua Griffith(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Polly Chapman(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Nancy Young(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1870년도에 미국 아칸소 주 랜돌프 로노크 타운시프에서, 1880년도에 미국 아칸소 주 랜돌프 제네스 크리크 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1880년 6월 2일 이후 미국 앨라배마 주 클레이에서 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 로렌스 레이븐든 스프링스 제네스 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Allen Griffith nasceu aproximadamente 1800, em Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Joshua Griffith, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Polly Chapman, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Nancy Young. Ele viveu em Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1870 e em Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1880. Ele faleceu após 2 de junho de 1880, em Clay, Alabama, Estados Unidos da América, e foi sepultado em Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Allen Griffith родился около 1800 г. в местности Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Joshua Griffith было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Polly Chapman, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Nancy Young. Он жил в местности роанок тоуншип, рандолф, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1870 году и в местности дженесь крик тоуншип, рандолф, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году. Он умер после 2 июнь 1880 г. в местности клеи, Алабама, Соединенные штаты и был похоронен в местности дженесь кеметири, равенден спрингс, ларенс, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Allen Griffith nació aproximadamente 1800, en Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos, su papá, Joshua Griffith, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Polly Chapman, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Nancy Young. Vivió en Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1870 y en Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1880. Murió después de 2 de junio de 1880, en Clay, Alabama, Estados Unidos, y fue sepultado en Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arkansas, Estados Unidos.
